demo.title: Design System Demo
demo.utilitiesGap: Gap between items via spacing tokens
demo.accordionStep1Text: Pick your favourite recipe from the list. Ingredients and serving size are pulled in automatically. Easily swap ingredients or tweak quantities.
demo.accordionStep2Text: All ingredients and current prices in one place. Compare options and pick the best deal.
demo.accordionStep3Text: Pick how many servings you want, and all ingredient amounts adjust automatically.
demo.accordionStep4Text: Save your final recipe, come back to it any time, or share it with your team.
demo.accordionFaqA1: Ingredients from our catalogue are supported. Add your own through the recipe edit form.
demo.accordionFaqQ2: How do I save a recipe?
demo.accordionFaqA2: Hit the Save button at the bottom of the constructor page. The recipe will appear in My Recipes.
demo.accordionFaqA3: Yes — share a link with your team or export it to PDF.
